Privacy Policy

Last Updated: January 2026

Information We Collect

Vape Empire collects information you voluntarily provide when subscribing to our newsletter, including your email address.

How We Use Your Information

Your information is used exclusively to send promotional emails and member-only offers. We do not sell your personal information.

Age Verification

Our website includes an age gate to prevent minors from accessing tobacco and vaping-related content.

Contact

Questions? Contact us at (706) 940-0717 or visit 6053 Veterans Pkwy Suite 202, Columbus, GA 31909.

Terms & Conditions

Last Updated: January 2026

Age Requirement

You must be 21 years of age or older to use this website or purchase products from Vape Empire.

Product Information

All products are intended for adult use only. Tobacco and vaping products contain nicotine, which is addictive.

Health Warning

WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is an addictive chemical. Keep all products out of reach of children.

Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of the State of Georgia. Disputes shall be resolved in Muscogee County, Georgia.

Age Policy

21+ Required

Vape Empire strictly enforces a 21+ age policy for all purchases in compliance with Georgia state and federal law.

In-Store & Delivery Verification

Valid government-issued photo ID required for all purchases and deliveries. Accepted: Driver's License, State ID, Passport, Military ID.

Zero Tolerance

Zero-tolerance policy for selling tobacco, vaping, or hemp products to anyone under 21.
